auditable_entities.name: Fund Administration Services - Dublin HQ
auditable_entities.description: Core fund administration operations including NAV calculation, investor services, and regulatory reporting for alternative investment funds headquartered in Dublin under Central Bank of Ireland oversight

auditable_entities.name: Client Onboarding & Relationship Management
auditable_entities.description: Client acquisition, onboarding processes, KYC/AML compliance, and ongoing relationship management including service level agreement monitoring

auditable_entities.name: Information Technology & Cybersecurity
auditable_entities.description: IT infrastructure, application management, cybersecurity operations, and DORA compliance including operational resilience testing and incident response

auditable_entities.name: Finance & Treasury Operations
auditable_entities.description: Financial reporting, treasury management, accounts payable/receivable, and financial controls including revenue recognition and billing processes

auditable_entities.name: Regulatory Compliance & Risk Management
auditable_entities.description: Regulatory compliance monitoring, risk management framework, AIFMD/UCITS/MiFID II compliance, and regulatory reporting obligations

auditable_entities.name: Human Resources & Talent Management
auditable_entities.description: Employee lifecycle management, compensation and benefits, talent acquisition, training and development, and succession planning

auditable_entities.name: Data Protection & Privacy
auditable_entities.description: GDPR compliance, data protection operations, privacy impact assessments, and data subject rights management across EMEA operations

auditable_entities.name: Third-Party & Vendor Management
auditable_entities.description: Vendor due diligence, contract management, outsourcing oversight, and third-party risk monitoring including critical service providers

auditable_entities.name: Sales & Business Development
auditable_entities.description: Sales execution, pipeline management, pre-sales technical support, and revenue generation activities across EMEA markets

auditable_entities.name: Transfer Agency Services
auditable_entities.description: Investor registry maintenance, subscription and redemption processing, distribution calculations, and investor communications

auditable_entities.name: Corporate Governance & Board Secretariat
auditable_entities.description: Board governance support, corporate secretarial services, regulatory filings, and governance framework maintenance for managed entities

auditable_entities.name: Business Continuity & Disaster Recovery
auditable_entities.description: Business continuity planning, disaster recovery capabilities, operational resilience testing, and crisis management procedures

assessment_factors.name: Regulatory Sensitivity
assessment_factors.description: Degree of regulatory oversight and compliance obligations affecting the entity

scoring_criteria.5: Critical regulatory exposure with frequent examinations

assessment_factors.name: Financial Impact
assessment_factors.description: Potential financial impact of control failures or risk materialization on company performance

assessment_factors.name: Process Complexity
assessment_factors.description: Inherent complexity of business processes including system dependencies and manual intervention requirements

scoring_criteria.3: Moderate complexity with some manual steps
scoring_criteria.4: High complexity with significant manual intervention
scoring_criteria.5: Highly complex with extensive manual processes and dependencies

assessment_factors.name: Change Velocity
assessment_factors.description: Rate of change in processes, systems, personnel, or regulatory requirements affecting stability

assessment_factors.name: Control Maturity
assessment_factors.description: Maturity level of existing controls based on prior audit results and control testing

assessment_factors.name: Data Sensitivity
assessment_factors.description: Classification and sensitivity of data processed including client PII and financial data

scoring_criteria.5: Highly sensitive PII and regulated data

audit_risk_assessments.notes: Core operations under CBI oversight with AIFMD/UCITS requirements. Critical financial impact given revenue concentration. Enhanced scrutiny warranted given DORA implementation.

DORA compliance certification achieved Q3 2024 but September penetration test revealed vulnerabilities. High change velocity due to AI capability investments. Cybersecurity controls require ongoing validation.
24-month CFO vacancy until Q3 2024 represents significant control gap. Revenue recognition complexity with sales volatility (84%-109% attainment). Exit preparation costs require scrutiny.
Client dispute escalations in Q2 2024 indicate service delivery concerns. Gross retention at 92% below 94% target. NRR fluctuating around 105% below benchmarks.
Multi-jurisdictional regulatory complexity across EMEA. DORA, AIFMD, UCITS, MiFID II, GDPR compliance requirements. Enhanced regulatory scrutiny expected during exit process.
Q1 2025 sales attainment volatility (84%) indicates process weaknesses. Insufficient pre-sales technical resources and extended client procurement cycles. Recovery to 96-109% by year-end.

audits.name: IT General Controls & Cybersecurity Assessment
audits.description: Comprehensive review of IT general controls, cybersecurity posture, and DORA compliance following September penetration test findings. Focus on vulnerability remediation and operational resilience.

audits.name: Revenue Recognition & Sales Process Review
audits.description: Detailed examination of revenue recognition practices, sales attainment metrics, quarter-end cutoff procedures, and contract terms given Q1 sales volatility (84% attainment).

audits.name: Client Retention & Service Delivery Assessment
audits.description: Review of client retention analytics, SLA compliance, billing accuracy, and customer satisfaction measurement systems following Q2 2024 client dispute escalations.

audits.name: Financial Controls & CFO Transition Review
audits.description: Assessment of financial control environment following 24-month CFO vacancy, evaluation of succession planning effectiveness, and review of exit preparation cost classification.

audits.name: Regulatory Compliance & DORA Certification Review
audits.description: Validation of DORA compliance certification, assessment of ongoing compliance monitoring, and review of multi-jurisdictional regulatory reporting obligations.

audits.name: Fund Administration Core Operations Audit
audits.description: Annual comprehensive audit of fund administration operations including NAV calculation accuracy, investor services, and regulatory reporting processes.

audits.name: Third-Party Risk & Vendor Management Assessment
audits.description: Review of vendor due diligence processes, contract management, critical service provider oversight, and ICT third-party risk management under DORA requirements.

audits.name: Data Protection & GDPR Compliance Audit
audits.description: Assessment of GDPR compliance, data protection practices, privacy impact assessments, and data subject rights management across EMEA operations.

audits.name: AI Investment & Technology Capitalization Review
audits.description: Validation of $800K AI capability investment capitalization treatment, ROI measurement frameworks, and technology investment governance.

audits.name: External Financial Statement Audit
audits.description: Annual statutory financial statement audit for FY2025 including exit preparation cost review and investment banking fee classification.

audit_plans.name: 2025 Annual Internal Audit Plan
audit_plans.description: Risk-based annual audit plan addressing key risk areas including DORA compliance, revenue recognition, client retention, financial controls following CFO transition, and technology investments.
audit_plans.risk_assessment_basis: Annual risk assessment completed January 2025 incorporating board packet risk signals and regulatory developments

audit_findings.title: Penetration Test Vulnerabilities Not Fully Remediated Within Target Timeline
audit_findings.criteria: Vulnerabilities identified in penetration testing should be remediated within 30 days for critical, 60 days for high, and 90 days for medium severity.
audit_findings.condition: September 2024 penetration test identified 3 critical and 7 high-severity vulnerabilities. While all critical items were addressed by December 31, 2 high-severity items remained open at audit fieldwork start.
audit_findings.cause: Insufficient resource allocation to remediation activities and competing priorities with DORA certification deadline.
audit_findings.effect: Extended exposure window to known vulnerabilities potentially exploitable by threat actors. Regulatory scrutiny risk under DORA operational resilience requirements.
audit_findings.recommendation: Establish dedicated vulnerability remediation tracking with escalation triggers. Implement automated patching where feasible. Add remediation KPIs to IT leadership scorecards.
audit_findings.management_response: Accepted. Vulnerability management program enhanced with weekly tracking meetings and dedicated remediation resources. All high-severity items now addressed within policy timelines.

audit_findings.title: Incomplete ICT Asset Inventory for DORA Compliance
audit_findings.criteria: DORA Article 5 requires financial entities to maintain a complete and accurate inventory of all ICT assets including third-party services.
audit_findings.condition: ICT asset inventory was 85% complete with gaps in shadow IT identification and third-party SaaS applications used by business units.
audit_findings.cause: Decentralized technology procurement and absence of automated discovery tools for cloud-based services.
audit_findings.effect: Incomplete visibility into ICT risk exposure. Potential regulatory finding during DORA examination. Unknown third-party dependencies affecting operational resilience planning.
audit_findings.recommendation: Deploy automated asset discovery and SaaS management tools. Implement mandatory IT procurement approval workflow. Conduct quarterly inventory reconciliation.
audit_findings.management_response: Agreed. SaaS management platform procurement in progress with Q2 deployment target. Interim manual inventory process established.

audit_findings.title: Business Continuity Testing Documentation Gaps
audit_findings.criteria: DORA requires documented testing of business continuity plans at least annually with lessons learned incorporated.
audit_findings.condition: BC/DR testing was conducted in 2024 but test results documentation was incomplete and lessons learned were not formally tracked.
audit_findings.cause: Testing conducted under time pressure with informal documentation practices.
audit_findings.effect: Inability to demonstrate compliance with DORA testing requirements. Missed improvement opportunities from test observations.
audit_findings.recommendation: Implement standardized BC/DR test documentation templates. Establish formal lessons learned process with tracking through to implementation.
audit_findings.management_response: Accepted. Documentation templates implemented and Q2 2025 BC/DR test completed with full documentation. Lessons learned process now operational.

audit_findings.title: Revenue Recognition Cutoff Control Weaknesses
audit_findings.criteria: Revenue should be recognized when performance obligations are satisfied in accordance with IFRS 15. Quarter-end cutoff procedures should ensure accurate period allocation.
audit_findings.condition: Q1 2025 sales attainment of 84% included 3 deals totaling €1.2M that were recognized in Q1 but had incomplete service commencement documentation.
audit_findings.cause: Pressure to meet quarterly targets combined with manual cutoff procedures and inadequate service commencement verification.
audit_findings.effect: Potential revenue recognition timing errors. Audit adjustments may be required. Quarterly financial reporting reliability concerns.
audit_findings.recommendation: Implement automated service commencement verification tied to revenue recognition. Enhance quarter-end cutoff review procedures with independent verification.
audit_findings.management_response: Agreed. Working with sales and operations to implement automated service commencement tracking. Enhanced CFO review procedures implemented for Q2 close.

audit_findings.title: Sales Pipeline Forecasting Accuracy Deficiencies
audit_findings.criteria: Sales pipeline forecasts should achieve 90%+ accuracy for 30-day forward projections to enable reliable financial planning.
audit_findings.condition: Q1 2025 pipeline forecast accuracy was 72%, significantly below target, contributing to the 84% sales attainment miss.
audit_findings.cause: Overly optimistic deal stage classifications, insufficient pre-sales technical qualification, and incomplete capture of client procurement timeline information.
audit_findings.effect: Resource misallocation, unreliable financial forecasts, and board reporting inaccuracies.
audit_findings.recommendation: Implement deal stage qualification criteria with mandatory technical pre-sales review. Require documented client procurement timelines for Stage 3+ opportunities.
audit_findings.management_response: Accepted. New deal qualification framework implemented. Pre-sales technical review now mandatory. Q2-Q4 forecast accuracy improved to 94%.

audit_findings.title: Client Service Level Agreement Monitoring Gaps
audit_findings.criteria: Client SLAs should be monitored continuously with automated alerting for threshold breaches and monthly reporting to relationship managers.
audit_findings.condition: SLA monitoring was manual and reactive. Q2 2024 client disputes resulted from missed SLA commitments that were not identified until client escalation.
audit_findings.cause: Legacy monitoring systems with limited automation, insufficient staffing for manual monitoring, and absence of proactive alerting.
audit_findings.effect: Client dissatisfaction, retention risk (gross retention at 92% vs 94% target), reputational damage, and potential contractual penalties.
audit_findings.recommendation: Implement automated SLA monitoring with real-time dashboards and proactive alerting. Establish weekly SLA review meetings with operations leadership.
audit_findings.management_response: Agreed. SLA monitoring platform selected and implementation in progress. Interim daily manual monitoring implemented with escalation procedures.

audit_findings.title: Customer Satisfaction Measurement Framework Inadequate
audit_findings.criteria: Customer satisfaction should be measured through regular surveys with response rates >40% and results incorporated into service improvement initiatives.
audit_findings.condition: Client satisfaction surveys were conducted annually with 28% response rate. No systematic follow-up on negative feedback.
audit_findings.cause: Survey fatigue from annual-only approach, lack of incentive for participation, and absence of closed-loop feedback process.
audit_findings.effect: Limited insight into client satisfaction trends, delayed identification of service issues, and inability to demonstrate client focus to potential acquirers.
audit_findings.recommendation: Implement quarterly pulse surveys with targeted questions. Establish mandatory follow-up process for detractor responses within 48 hours.
audit_findings.management_response: Accepted. Quarterly NPS surveys implemented with 52% response rate in Q3. Closed-loop feedback process operational.

audit_findings.title: Executive Succession Planning Deficiencies
audit_findings.criteria: Critical executive positions should have documented succession plans with identified successors and development plans reviewed annually by the Board.
audit_findings.condition: The 24-month CFO vacancy with Acting CFO arrangement indicates significant succession planning gaps. No documented succession plans exist for other C-suite positions.
audit_findings.cause: Board attention focused on operational matters, limited HR resources for executive development programs, and PE sponsor preference for external hires.
audit_findings.effect: Extended leadership gaps during critical periods, key person risk exposure, and reduced attractiveness to potential acquirers.
audit_findings.recommendation: Develop formal succession plans for all C-suite positions. Identify and develop internal candidates where feasible. Establish emergency succession protocols.
audit_findings.management_response: Agreed. Succession planning initiative launched with external consultant. C-suite succession plans to be completed Q4 2025.

audit_findings.title: Exit Preparation Cost Classification Inconsistencies
audit_findings.criteria: Exit-related costs should be classified consistently in accordance with IFRS and disclosed appropriately in financial statements.
audit_findings.condition: Investment banking fees and exit preparation costs were inconsistently classified between operating expenses and one-time items across quarters.
audit_findings.cause: Absence of documented policy for exit-related cost classification and turnover in finance leadership during the period.
audit_findings.effect: Inconsistent financial reporting, potential audit adjustments, and reduced comparability of operating metrics.
audit_findings.recommendation: Establish written policy for exit-related cost identification and classification. Implement enhanced CFO review of unusual expense classifications.
audit_findings.management_response: Accepted. Exit cost classification policy documented and retroactive adjustments made. Enhanced disclosure prepared for FY2025 financial statements.

audit_findings.title: NAV Calculation Exception Handling Documentation
audit_findings.criteria: NAV calculation exceptions should be documented with approval evidence and root cause analysis.
audit_findings.condition: 5% of NAV calculation exceptions in the audit sample period had incomplete documentation of approval and root cause.
audit_findings.cause: Manual documentation process with inconsistent adherence during high-volume periods.
audit_findings.effect: Limited audit trail for exception handling, potential regulatory inquiry concerns.
audit_findings.recommendation: Implement workflow-based exception documentation with mandatory fields and supervisor approval capture.
audit_findings.management_response: Accepted. Workflow enhancement implemented. Exception documentation compliance improved to 99%.

audit_findings.title: Critical Third-Party Concentration Risk Not Monitored
audit_findings.criteria: DORA requires identification and monitoring of concentration risk for ICT third-party service providers.
audit_findings.condition: 3 critical ICT service providers represent 65% of technology spend with limited alternative provider analysis documented.
audit_findings.cause: Historical vendor relationships without periodic strategic review, absence of concentration risk monitoring framework.
audit_findings.effect: Elevated operational resilience risk, regulatory compliance gap under DORA, potential service disruption impact.
audit_findings.recommendation: Implement third-party concentration risk monitoring. Develop contingency plans for critical providers. Evaluate alternative provider options.
audit_findings.management_response: Agreed. Third-party concentration risk assessment initiated. Alternative provider evaluation in progress for top 3 critical providers.

audit_findings.title: Vendor Due Diligence Refresh Cycle Non-Compliance
audit_findings.criteria: Critical vendors should undergo due diligence refresh annually, high-risk vendors every 2 years.
audit_findings.condition: 35% of critical vendors had due diligence older than 18 months at audit date.
audit_findings.cause: Manual tracking of due diligence cycles, resource constraints in vendor management function.
audit_findings.effect: Incomplete visibility into vendor risk profile changes, potential regulatory concerns.
audit_findings.recommendation: Implement automated due diligence tracking with alerts for upcoming renewals. Prioritize critical vendor refreshes.
audit_findings.management_response: Agreed. Critical vendor due diligence refresh prioritized. Automated tracking system implementation planned for Q1 2026.

audit_findings.title: AI Investment ROI Measurement Framework Incomplete
audit_findings.criteria: Technology investments exceeding €500K should have documented ROI measurement frameworks with defined KPIs and tracking mechanisms.
audit_findings.condition: $800K AI capability investment lacks comprehensive ROI measurement framework. Initial efficiency metrics defined but not systematically tracked.
audit_findings.cause: Focus on implementation speed over measurement framework development, limited data analytics resources.
audit_findings.effect: Inability to demonstrate investment value, risk of continued investment without evidence of return, audit and board reporting gaps.
audit_findings.recommendation: Develop comprehensive AI investment ROI framework with baseline metrics, target outcomes, and quarterly tracking. Present to Audit Committee.
audit_findings.management_response: Agreed. ROI framework development in progress with finance partnership. Initial metrics and targets to be presented to Board in Q1 2026.

risks.name: Revenue Recognition Timing and Accuracy
risks.description: Risk of material misstatement in revenue recognition due to sales volatility (84%-109% quarterly attainment), complex contract terms, and quarter-end cutoff procedures during exit preparation period.

risks.name: Sales Execution and Forecasting Volatility
risks.description: Risk of continued sales underperformance due to inadequate sales team ramping, insufficient pre-sales technical resources, and extended client procurement cycles impacting revenue targets.

risks.name: Cybersecurity Breach and Data Compromise
risks.description: Risk of cybersecurity incident resulting in data breach, service disruption, or regulatory penalty following September penetration test vulnerabilities and evolving threat landscape.

risks.name: DORA Compliance and Operational Resilience
risks.description: Risk of regulatory sanction or operational disruption due to incomplete DORA compliance despite Q3 certification, including ICT asset inventory gaps and third-party risk management requirements.

risks.name: Business Continuity and Disaster Recovery Capability
risks.description: Risk of extended service disruption due to business continuity gaps including documentation weaknesses identified in BC/DR testing and evolving DORA operational resilience requirements.

risks.name: Client Retention and Service Quality
risks.description: Risk of client attrition and revenue loss due to service delivery gaps, SLA non-compliance, and client dissatisfaction as evidenced by Q2 disputes and gross retention at 92% vs 94% target.

risks.name: Key Person Dependency and Succession
risks.description: Risk of operational disruption and institutional knowledge loss due to key person dependencies and inadequate succession planning as demonstrated by the 24-month CFO vacancy.

risks.name: Exit Preparation and Transaction Risk
risks.description: Risk of transaction value erosion or failed exit due to financial reporting inconsistencies, cost classification issues, and operational performance volatility during sale process.

risks.name: Fund Administration Processing Errors
risks.description: Risk of NAV calculation errors, investor services failures, or regulatory reporting inaccuracies affecting client trust and regulatory standing.

risks.name: Third-Party and Vendor Concentration
risks.description: Risk of service disruption or compliance breach due to critical third-party concentration (65% of IT spend with 3 providers) and incomplete vendor due diligence cycles.

risks.name: Technology Investment and AI Adoption
risks.description: Risk of failed technology investments including $800K AI capability spend due to incomplete ROI measurement, rapid market changes, and competitive pressures from AI-native competitors.

risks.name: Competitive Pressure from Offshore and AI-Native Providers
risks.description: Risk of market share loss in SMB segment due to competitive pressures from offshore providers and emerging AI-native competitors offering lower-cost alternatives.

risks.name: GDPR and Data Protection Compliance
risks.description: Risk of regulatory penalty or reputational damage due to data protection non-compliance particularly given cybersecurity vulnerabilities and sensitive fund administration data.

risks.name: Multi-Jurisdictional Regulatory Compliance
risks.description: Risk of regulatory breach across EMEA jurisdictions due to complexity of AIFMD, UCITS, and MiFID II requirements and varying national licensing obligations.

risks.name: Liquidity and Cash Management
risks.description: Risk of liquidity constraints impacting operations given $30.2M net cash position, debt service obligations, and potential market downturn scenarios during exit process.

risks.name: Alternative Asset Market Concentration
risks.description: Risk of revenue volatility due to heavy dependence on alternative asset manager growth in a cyclical sector, creating concentration risk in client base and market segment.

risks.name: Financial Leadership and Control Environment
risks.description: Risk of financial control weaknesses and reporting errors due to recent CFO transition, historical Acting CFO arrangement, and exit preparation pressures.

risks.name: Governance Independence and PE Sponsor Influence
risks.description: Risk of governance conflicts and reduced independent oversight due to PE sponsor control (68.4%) during exit process, potentially affecting decision-making quality.

risk_mitigation_plans.name: Revenue Recognition Control Enhancement
risk_mitigation_plans.description: Implementation of automated service commencement verification, enhanced quarter-end cutoff procedures, and CFO review protocols for revenue recognition.
planned_actions: Deploy automated service commencement tracking system
Implement independent verification of quarter-end revenue cutoffs
Establish CFO sign-off requirement for complex revenue arrangements
Enhance monthly revenue recognition review meetings
risk_mitigation_plans.progress_notes: Automated tracking system in development. Enhanced CFO review procedures implemented Q2. Cutoff verification procedures enhanced Q3.

risk_mitigation_plans.name: Client Retention Improvement Program
risk_mitigation_plans.description: Comprehensive program to address client satisfaction and retention including SLA monitoring automation, customer feedback enhancement, and service delivery improvements.
planned_actions: Implement automated SLA monitoring platform with real-time dashboards
Deploy quarterly NPS surveys with closed-loop feedback process
Establish weekly SLA review meetings with operations leadership
Develop client success manager role for key accounts
risk_mitigation_plans.progress_notes: NPS surveys implemented Q3 (FND-7 closed). SLA monitoring platform selected and implementation in progress. Weekly reviews operational.

risk_mitigation_plans.name: Executive Succession Planning Initiative
risk_mitigation_plans.description: Development of formal succession plans for all C-suite positions with identified successors, development plans, and emergency succession protocols.
planned_actions: Develop succession plans for all C-suite roles
Identify and assess internal successor candidates
Establish development programs for high-potential executives
risk_mitigation_plans.progress_notes: External consultant engaged. CFO succession addressed through permanent hire. C-suite succession plans in development for Q4 Board presentation.

risk_mitigation_plans.name: Third-Party Risk Management Enhancement
risk_mitigation_plans.description: Implementation of comprehensive third-party concentration risk monitoring and vendor due diligence refresh program to address DORA requirements.
planned_actions: Implement third-party concentration risk monitoring framework
Evaluate alternative providers for top 3 critical ICT vendors
Deploy automated due diligence tracking system
Prioritize critical vendor due diligence refreshes
Develop contingency plans for critical service providers
risk_mitigation_plans.progress_notes: Concentration risk assessment initiated. Alternative provider evaluation in progress. Automated tracking system planned for Q1 2026.

controls.name: Revenue Recognition Review and Approval
controls.description: CFO review and approval of revenue recognition for all contracts exceeding €500K or with complex terms including multi-element arrangements.
controls.test_procedure: Select sample of contracts exceeding threshold, verify CFO approval documentation, test timing of revenue recognition against service commencement.
controls.evidence_required: Signed approval forms, service commencement documentation, contract terms comparison

controls.name: Quarter-End Revenue Cutoff Verification
controls.description: Independent verification of revenue transactions recorded in final 5 business days of each quarter to ensure proper period allocation.
controls.test_procedure: Review cutoff verification documentation for quarter-end, test sample of transactions for proper period allocation, verify service commencement documentation.
controls.evidence_required: Cutoff verification checklist, service commencement evidence, adjustment documentation

controls.name: Sales Pipeline Review and Qualification
controls.description: Weekly sales pipeline review with mandatory deal stage qualification criteria and pre-sales technical review for Stage 3+ opportunities.
controls.test_procedure: Attend pipeline review meetings, verify qualification criteria application, test deal stage accuracy against actual outcomes.
controls.evidence_required: Pipeline review meeting minutes, CRM system data, deal stage documentation

controls.name: Service Level Agreement Monitoring
controls.description: Monitoring of client service level agreements with automated alerting for threshold breaches and daily operations review.
controls.test_procedure: Review SLA monitoring reports, test alerting functionality, verify response to threshold breaches.
controls.evidence_required: SLA monitoring reports, alert logs, breach response documentation

controls.name: Client Escalation Management
controls.description: Formal escalation process for client complaints and service issues with defined response timelines and management notification requirements.
controls.test_procedure: Review escalation log, verify response timelines, test management notification compliance.
controls.evidence_required: Escalation tickets, response timeline documentation, management notification records

controls.name: Customer Satisfaction Measurement
controls.description: Quarterly Net Promoter Score surveys with mandatory follow-up for detractor responses within 48 hours.
controls.test_procedure: Review survey distribution and response rates, verify detractor follow-up compliance, assess action tracking.
controls.evidence_required: Survey results, detractor follow-up records, action tracking documentation

controls.name: Vulnerability Management Program
controls.description: Systematic identification, assessment, and remediation of security vulnerabilities with defined timelines based on severity classification.
controls.test_procedure: Review vulnerability scan results, verify remediation timelines, test patch deployment effectiveness.
controls.evidence_required: Vulnerability scan reports, remediation tracking records, patch deployment logs

controls.name: Penetration Testing Program
controls.description: Quarterly penetration testing of critical systems with immediate remediation of critical findings and 30-day timeline for high-severity items.
controls.test_procedure: Review penetration test reports, verify finding remediation, assess retest results.
controls.evidence_required: Penetration test reports, remediation evidence, retest confirmation

controls.name: ICT Asset Inventory Management
controls.description: Maintenance of comprehensive ICT asset inventory including hardware, software, and third-party services with quarterly reconciliation.
controls.test_procedure: Compare asset inventory to discovery scan results, verify completeness, test reconciliation process.
controls.evidence_required: Asset inventory reports, discovery scan results, reconciliation documentation

controls.name: Business Continuity Testing
controls.description: Annual comprehensive BC/DR testing with documented test plans, execution records, lessons learned, and improvement tracking.
controls.test_procedure: Review test plans and execution documentation, verify lessons learned tracking, assess improvement implementation.
controls.evidence_required: Test plans, execution records, lessons learned documentation, improvement tracking

controls.name: Executive Succession Planning
controls.description: Annual review and update of C-suite succession plans with identified successors, development plans, and emergency protocols.
controls.test_procedure: Review succession plans, verify successor identification and readiness assessment, test emergency protocols.
controls.evidence_required: Succession plans, development plans, Board presentation materials

controls.name: Exit Cost Classification Review
controls.description: CFO review and approval of exit-related cost classification with documented policy application and disclosure assessment.
controls.test_procedure: Review exit cost classification decisions, verify policy application, assess disclosure adequacy.
controls.evidence_required: Classification decision documentation, policy reference, disclosure drafts

controls.name: NAV Calculation Exception Handling
controls.description: Workflow-based exception documentation for NAV calculation variances with mandatory fields, supervisor approval, and root cause analysis.
controls.test_procedure: Review exception handling documentation, verify approval evidence, test root cause analysis completeness.
controls.evidence_required: Exception workflow records, approval documentation, root cause analysis

controls.name: Third-Party Concentration Risk Monitoring
controls.description: Quarterly monitoring of ICT third-party concentration with spend analysis, alternative provider assessment, and contingency planning.
controls.test_procedure: Review concentration analysis, verify alternative provider assessments, test contingency plan adequacy.
controls.evidence_required: Concentration reports, alternative provider documentation, contingency plans

controls.name: Vendor Due Diligence Refresh
controls.description: Risk-based vendor due diligence refresh program with annual refresh for critical vendors and biennial for standard vendors.
controls.test_procedure: Review due diligence tracking, verify refresh completion rates, assess due diligence scope adequacy.
controls.evidence_required: Due diligence tracking reports, completed assessments, risk ratings

controls.name: Technology Investment ROI Tracking
controls.description: Quarterly tracking of technology investment returns against business cases with defined KPIs and variance analysis.
controls.test_procedure: Review ROI tracking documentation, verify KPI measurement accuracy, assess variance analysis completeness.
controls.evidence_required: ROI tracking reports, KPI dashboards, variance analysis documentation

controls.name: Pre-Sales Technical Qualification
controls.description: Mandatory technical qualification review for all opportunities exceeding €250K before advancing to Stage 3.
controls.test_procedure: Review technical qualification records, verify completion before stage advancement, assess qualification scope.
controls.evidence_required: Technical qualification forms, CRM stage history, qualification meeting notes

controls.name: Security Incident Response
controls.description: Defined security incident response procedures with severity classification, response timelines, and notification requirements.
controls.test_procedure: Review incident response documentation, verify response timeline compliance, test tabletop exercises.
controls.evidence_required: Incident tickets, response timeline documentation, tabletop exercise records

controls.name: Regulatory Change Monitoring
controls.description: Systematic monitoring of regulatory changes across EMEA jurisdictions with impact assessment and implementation tracking.
controls.test_procedure: Review regulatory change tracking, verify impact assessments, test implementation timeline compliance.
controls.evidence_required: Regulatory tracking reports, impact assessments, implementation records

controls.name: Operational Resilience Testing
controls.description: DORA-compliant operational resilience testing including scenario-based testing of critical business functions.
controls.test_procedure: Review resilience test plans and results, verify scenario coverage, assess improvement tracking.
controls.evidence_required: Resilience test documentation, scenario matrices, improvement plans

controls.name: Key Person Risk Assessment
controls.description: Annual assessment of key person dependencies with documentation requirements and knowledge transfer protocols.
controls.test_procedure: Review key person assessments, verify documentation requirements, test knowledge transfer protocols.
controls.evidence_required: Key person assessments, documentation checklists, knowledge transfer records

controls.name: Exit Process Governance
controls.description: Formal governance framework for exit process including Board oversight, independent committee review, and milestone tracking.
controls.test_procedure: Review Board and committee minutes, verify milestone tracking, assess independence of oversight.
controls.evidence_required: Board minutes, committee reports, milestone tracking documentation

controls.name: NAV Calculation Four-Eyes Review
controls.description: Independent four-eyes review of all NAV calculations before client distribution with documented approval.
controls.test_procedure: Review four-eyes approval records, verify reviewer independence, test calculation accuracy.
controls.evidence_required: Approval logs, reviewer certifications, calculation worksheets

controls.name: Technology Investment Governance
controls.description: Formal governance process for technology investments exceeding €250K including business case approval and post-implementation review.
controls.test_procedure: Review investment governance documentation, verify business case approvals, assess post-implementation reviews.
controls.evidence_required: Business cases, approval records, post-implementation review reports

controls.name: Competitive Intelligence Monitoring
controls.description: Monthly monitoring of competitive landscape including offshore and AI-native providers with strategic response assessment.
controls.test_procedure: Review competitive intelligence reports, verify coverage of key competitors, assess strategic response documentation.
controls.evidence_required: Competitive intelligence reports, strategy documents, market analysis

controls.name: Privacy Impact Assessment
controls.description: Privacy impact assessments for all new processing activities or significant changes to existing processes involving personal data.
controls.test_procedure: Review PIA completion records, verify assessment scope, test change trigger identification.
controls.evidence_required: PIAs, processing register, change management records

controls.name: Data Subject Rights Management
controls.description: Defined process for handling data subject rights requests with response timelines and escalation procedures.
controls.test_procedure: Review DSR handling records, verify response timeline compliance, test escalation procedures.
controls.evidence_required: DSR tracking logs, response documentation, timeline reports

controls.name: Regulatory Reporting Automation
controls.description: Automated regulatory reporting processes with validation checks and supervisor review before submission.
controls.test_procedure: Review automated validation results, verify supervisor approval, test reporting accuracy.
controls.evidence_required: Validation reports, supervisor approvals, submission confirmations

controls.name: Cash Management and Forecasting
controls.description: Weekly cash flow forecasting with debt service coverage monitoring and liquidity threshold alerts.
controls.test_procedure: Review cash forecasts, verify debt service coverage calculations, test threshold alerting.
controls.evidence_required: Cash forecasts, coverage reports, alert logs

controls.name: Market Segment Diversification Monitoring
controls.description: Quarterly analysis of client concentration and market segment exposure with strategic planning integration.
controls.test_procedure: Review concentration analysis, verify strategic planning integration, assess diversification initiatives.
controls.evidence_required: Concentration reports, strategic plans, diversification initiatives

controls.name: Financial Close Process Checklist
controls.description: Comprehensive monthly close checklist with segregation of duties, reconciliation requirements, and management sign-off.
controls.test_procedure: Review close checklist completion, verify segregation of duties, test reconciliation accuracy.
controls.evidence_required: Close checklists, reconciliations, management sign-offs

controls.name: Board Independence and Conflict Management
controls.description: Formal protocols for managing Board conflicts of interest and ensuring independent oversight during exit process.
controls.test_procedure: Review conflict disclosure records, verify independence assessments, test protocol compliance.
controls.evidence_required: Conflict disclosures, independence certifications, protocol documentation

control_assessments.test_evidence: Reviewed 25 contracts exceeding €500K threshold from Q2-Q3 2025. All contracts had documented CFO approval prior to revenue recognition. Service commencement documentation complete for all sampled items.

Reviewed quarter-end cutoff verification for Q1-Q3 2025. Q1 cutoff verification identified 3 transactions with incomplete service commencement documentation subsequently corrected. Q2-Q3 procedures strengthened with 100% documentation compliance.

Attended 4 weekly pipeline review meetings in August. Verified deal stage qualification criteria consistently applied. Pre-sales technical review mandatory for all Stage 3+ opportunities exceeding €250K. Pipeline forecast accuracy improved to 94%.

SLA monitoring partially manual with limited real-time alerting. Daily monitoring reports reviewed but 2 SLA breaches in sample period not identified until client escalation. Automated monitoring platform selection in progress.

Reviewed vulnerability management program following September 2024 penetration test. All critical vulnerabilities remediated within 30-day policy. 2 high-severity items initially delayed but now within compliance. Weekly tracking meetings operational.

ICT asset inventory at 85% completeness at assessment date with gaps in shadow IT and third-party SaaS applications. Manual tracking in place but automated discovery lacking. SaaS management platform procurement initiated.

Q2 2025 BC/DR testing completed with full documentation per enhanced templates. Lessons learned formally documented and tracked. Test demonstrated successful recovery within RTOs for critical systems.

No documented succession plans exist for C-suite positions. 24-month CFO vacancy demonstrates succession planning gap. Emergency succession protocols undefined. Initiative launched with external consultant.

Reviewed 50 NAV calculation exceptions from Q2-Q3 2025. 98% had complete documentation with supervisor approval and root cause analysis. Workflow enhancement effective. Minor gaps addressed through coaching.
Concentration risk identified - 3 providers represent 65% of ICT spend. Quarterly monitoring report exists but lacks formal alternative provider assessment and contingency plan documentation.
35% of critical vendors had due diligence older than 18 months at assessment date. Manual tracking of refresh cycles contributing to gaps. Automated tracking system planned.
$800K AI investment has initial efficiency metrics defined but comprehensive ROI measurement framework incomplete. Baseline metrics established but tracking not systematic.

control_deficiencies.description: Quarter-end revenue cutoff procedures not consistently executed in Q1 2025, resulting in 3 deals with incomplete service commencement documentation at time of revenue recognition.
control_deficiencies.root_cause: Manual cutoff procedures combined with pressure to meet quarterly targets and inadequate service commencement verification workflow.
control_deficiencies.remediation_plan: Implement automated service commencement tracking tied to revenue recognition. Enhance quarter-end cutoff review with independent verification.

control_deficiencies.description: SLA monitoring control design relies heavily on manual processes with limited real-time alerting, resulting in delayed identification of SLA breaches.
control_deficiencies.root_cause: Legacy monitoring systems with limited automation and absence of proactive alerting capabilities. Insufficient staffing for manual monitoring approach.
control_deficiencies.remediation_plan: Implement automated SLA monitoring platform with real-time dashboards and proactive alerting. Establish weekly SLA review meetings.

control_deficiencies.description: ICT asset inventory 85% complete with gaps in shadow IT identification and third-party SaaS applications used by business units.
control_deficiencies.root_cause: Decentralized technology procurement and absence of automated discovery tools for cloud-based services.
control_deficiencies.remediation_plan: Deploy automated asset discovery and SaaS management tools. Implement mandatory IT procurement approval workflow.

control_deficiencies.description: Executive succession planning control is ineffective - no documented succession plans exist for C-suite positions and emergency succession protocols are undefined.
control_deficiencies.root_cause: Board attention focused on operational matters, limited HR resources for executive development, and PE sponsor preference for external hires.
control_deficiencies.remediation_plan: Develop formal succession plans for all C-suite positions. Identify internal candidates. Establish emergency succession protocols.

control_deficiencies.description: Third-party concentration risk monitoring lacks formal alternative provider assessment and contingency plan documentation for critical ICT providers.
control_deficiencies.root_cause: Historical vendor relationships without periodic strategic review and absence of concentration risk monitoring framework.
control_deficiencies.remediation_plan: Implement third-party concentration risk monitoring framework. Develop contingency plans for critical providers. Evaluate alternatives.

control_deficiencies.description: 35% of critical vendors have due diligence older than 18-month policy requirement due to manual tracking of refresh cycles.
control_deficiencies.root_cause: Manual tracking of due diligence cycles and resource constraints in vendor management function.
control_deficiencies.remediation_plan: Implement automated due diligence tracking with alerts for upcoming renewals. Prioritize critical vendor refreshes.

control_deficiencies.description: $800K AI investment ROI measurement framework incomplete - initial metrics defined but not systematically tracked with clear targets.
control_deficiencies.root_cause: Focus on implementation speed over measurement framework development and limited data analytics resources.
control_deficiencies.remediation_plan: Develop comprehensive AI investment ROI framework with baseline metrics, target outcomes, and quarterly tracking.

processes.name: Revenue Recognition and Financial Close
processes.description: End-to-end process for revenue recognition including contract review, service commencement verification, revenue allocation, and monthly/quarterly close procedures.

processes.name: Sales and Business Development
processes.description: Sales lifecycle process including lead generation, opportunity qualification, proposal development, contract negotiation, and deal closure.

processes.name: Client Relationship Management
processes.description: Ongoing client management including service delivery monitoring, SLA compliance, escalation handling, and satisfaction measurement.

processes.name: Information Security Management
processes.description: Cybersecurity operations including vulnerability management, penetration testing, incident response, and security monitoring.

processes.name: IT Asset and Investment Management
processes.description: IT asset lifecycle management including inventory maintenance, investment governance, and technology ROI tracking.

processes.name: Business Continuity Management
processes.description: Business continuity and disaster recovery including plan maintenance, testing, lessons learned, and operational resilience.

processes.name: Talent and Succession Management
processes.description: Human capital management including succession planning, key person risk assessment, and talent development.

processes.name: Fund Administration Operations
processes.description: Core fund administration including NAV calculation, investor services, exception handling, and quality assurance.

processes.name: Third-Party Risk Management
processes.description: Vendor lifecycle management including due diligence, contract management, performance monitoring, and concentration risk assessment.

processes.name: Regulatory Compliance Management
processes.description: Regulatory monitoring, change management, reporting, and compliance certification across EMEA jurisdictions.

processes.name: Corporate Governance and Exit Management
processes.description: Board governance, conflict management, and exit process oversight including milestone tracking and stakeholder management.

processes.name: Data Protection and Privacy
processes.description: GDPR compliance including privacy impact assessments, data subject rights management, and breach notification.

processes.name: Treasury and Cash Management
processes.description: Cash flow forecasting, debt service management, and liquidity monitoring.

objectives.name: Financial Reporting Integrity
objectives.description: Ensure accurate and timely financial reporting in compliance with IFRS standards to support exit process due diligence.
key_results: Monthly close completed within 5 business days

objectives.name: Commercial Performance Recovery
objectives.description: Restore sales attainment to 100%+ through improved forecasting, deal qualification, and pre-sales support.

objectives.name: Client Retention Improvement
objectives.description: Improve client retention metrics to meet targets and enhance service delivery quality.

objectives.name: Technology Security and Resilience
objectives.description: Maintain robust cybersecurity posture and complete AI capability deployment with measurable ROI.

objectives.name: Financial Stability and Liquidity
objectives.description: Maintain adequate liquidity and improve EBITDA margins through operational efficiency.

objectives.name: Operational Resilience
objectives.description: Ensure business continuity and third-party risk management capabilities meet DORA requirements.
key_results: BC/DR testing completed with documented results

objectives.name: Leadership Continuity
objectives.description: Establish succession planning for all C-suite positions and address key person dependencies.
key_results: Succession plans documented for all C-suite

objectives.name: Operational Excellence in Fund Administration
objectives.description: Maintain industry-leading accuracy and efficiency in fund administration operations.

objectives.name: Regulatory Compliance Excellence
objectives.description: Maintain exemplary regulatory compliance across all EMEA jurisdictions.
key_results: GDPR DSR response within policy timelines

objectives.name: Successful Exit Execution
objectives.description: Execute PE exit process with optimal value realization and stakeholder satisfaction.
key_results: Exit process milestones achieved on schedule

standards_regulations.name: Digital Operational Resilience Act (DORA)
standards_regulations.description: EU regulation establishing requirements for ICT risk management, incident reporting, operational resilience testing, and third-party risk management for financial entities.
standards_regulations.applicability: All EU financial entities including fund administrators

standards_regulations.name: General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR)
standards_regulations.description: EU regulation governing the protection of personal data and privacy for individuals within the EU and EEA.
standards_regulations.applicability: All organizations processing EU resident personal data

standards_regulations.name: Alternative Investment Fund Managers Directive (AIFMD)
standards_regulations.description: EU directive regulating alternative investment fund managers including fund administrators providing services to AIFs.

standards_regulations.name: UCITS Directive
standards_regulations.description: EU directive establishing the regulatory framework for undertakings for collective investment in transferable securities.

standards_regulations.name: Markets in Financial Instruments Directive II (MiFID II)
standards_regulations.description: EU directive governing investment services and activities including related fund administration services.

standards_regulations.name: Central Bank of Ireland Fund Administration Requirements
standards_regulations.description: Regulatory requirements for fund administrators authorized by the Central Bank of Ireland.

standards_regulations.name: International Financial Reporting Standards (IFRS)
standards_regulations.description: International accounting standards for financial reporting including revenue recognition under IFRS 15.

standards_regulations.name: ISO 27001 Information Security Management
standards_regulations.description: International standard for information security management systems providing requirements for establishing, implementing, and maintaining ISMS.

requirements.name: ICT Risk Management Framework
requirements.description: Financial entities shall have in place an internal governance and control framework that ensures an effective and prudent management of ICT risk.
requirements.requirement_text: DORA Article 5 - ICT risk management framework requirements

requirements.name: Digital Operational Resilience Testing
requirements.description: Financial entities shall maintain a sound and comprehensive digital operational resilience testing programme.
requirements.requirement_text: DORA Article 24-27 - Digital operational resilience testing

requirements.name: ICT Third-Party Risk Management
requirements.description: Financial entities shall manage ICT third-party risk as an integral component of ICT risk within their ICT risk management framework.

requirements.name: Data Protection Impact Assessment
requirements.description: Controllers shall carry out an assessment of the impact of processing operations on the protection of personal data.
requirements.requirement_text: GDPR Article 35 - Data protection impact assessment

requirements.name: Data Subject Rights
requirements.description: Controllers shall facilitate the exercise of data subject rights including access, rectification, erasure, and data portability.
requirements.requirement_text: GDPR Articles 15-22 - Rights of data subjects

requirements.name: Revenue Recognition from Contracts with Customers
requirements.description: Entity shall recognize revenue when it satisfies a performance obligation by transferring a promised good or service to a customer.
requirements.requirement_text: IFRS 15 - Core principle and five-step model

evidence.description: Vulnerability management policy and procedures documentation including severity classification and remediation timelines.
September 2024 penetration test report and remediation tracking documentation.
Q2 2025 BC/DR test plan, execution records, and lessons learned documentation.
Operational resilience testing programme documentation and annual test schedule.
Third-party concentration risk analysis and critical vendor listing as of September 2025.
Privacy impact assessment register and completed PIAs for 2025 processing changes.
Data subject request tracking report for 2025 including response timeline analysis.
Revenue recognition policy documentation and CFO approval forms for sampled contracts.
Executive succession planning documentation (or lack thereof) as of July 2025.
NAV calculation exception handling sample and documentation compliance analysis.

requests.request_description: Provide vulnerability management policy, procedures, and remediation tracking documentation for September 2024 penetration test findings.
Provide September 2024 penetration test report, findings summary, and remediation evidence for all critical and high-severity items.
Provide BC/DR test documentation including test plans, execution records, lessons learned, and improvement tracking.
Provide revenue recognition policy, CFO approval documentation for contracts >€500K, and service commencement verification records for Q1 2025.
Provide executive succession plans for all C-suite positions, including emergency succession protocols and development plans.
Provide third-party concentration analysis, critical vendor listing, and due diligence tracking report.
Provide AI investment business case, ROI framework documentation, and efficiency metrics tracking for $800K capability investment.

assessment_methods.name: Documentation Review
assessment_methods.description: Review of policies, procedures, and supporting documentation to assess control design and implementation.

assessment_methods.name: Walkthrough Testing
assessment_methods.description: End-to-end walkthrough of a control process to verify design effectiveness and identify potential gaps.

assessment_methods.name: Sample Testing
assessment_methods.description: Selection and testing of a representative sample of transactions to assess operating effectiveness.

assessment_methods.name: Re-performance
assessment_methods.description: Independent re-execution of control procedures to verify accuracy and completeness.

assessment_methods.name: Data Analytics
assessment_methods.description: Use of data analytics tools to analyze complete populations for anomalies and control exceptions.

assessment_methods.name: Technical Testing
assessment_methods.description: Technical assessment of IT controls including penetration testing, vulnerability scanning, and configuration review.

assessment_methods.name: Management Inquiry
assessment_methods.description: Structured interviews with management and process owners to understand control design and operation.
